package rulefixtures

// scenario for rand_new_per_call: `rand.New(...)` inside regular call paths instead of reusing a generator.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule624NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario624Negative(records []Rule624NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
